name: Vero

auth.notes: Track API uses an auth_token request parameter over HTTPS. Campaigns REST API preview uses an Authorization header accepting either a raw secret key or Bearer <sk_KEY>; optional revision header uses YYYY-MM-DD.

rateLimits: No public per-endpoint request-rate limits found; account usage limits and overages are subscription based.
pagination: Track API write endpoints do not paginate. Campaigns REST API preview list endpoints return ordered arrays; no cursor/page contract found in public docs.
notes: Official docs cover Track API endpoints, JavaScript/TypeScript SDK, community/server SDK references, webhooks, and Campaigns REST API preview endpoints.
Campaigns REST API is explicitly preview; treat campaign/content mutations and user delete/unsubscribe actions as high-risk.
